feat: Helvetica font, remove programa list, fix marquee & mobile responsive

- All fonts → Helvetica Neue (drop DX Grafik / Bootzy / Drowner @font-face)
- Remove Google Fonts link from HTML
- Delete "Todo lo que se te ocurra" paragraph + full programa-grid (10 items)
- Fix duplicate .marquee-strip::after that broke marquee fade
- Fix identity-grid on 480px: 1-col instead of broken repeat(3,1fr)
- Show identity-prompt-block on mobile (was display:none)
- Improve mobile padding/typography across all breakpoints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: real images, semantic tokens, light prompt containers

- Add semantic alias CSS tokens (--bg-main, --primary-cta, --text-authority, etc.)
- Restyle prompt-container: dark → light editorial (#faf8f5 + green left border)
- Restyle btn-copy-prompt: dark ghost → bordered pill with CTA hover
- Identity grid: replace placeholders with real 4K renders (1.jpeg/2.png/3.jpeg)
  - Frontal 1:1, Cuerpo Completo 9:16, UGC Contexto 16:9
  - Image zoom on hover, res badge, dark angle pill label
  - Each card has working copy-prompt button for its generation prompt
- pain-quote: font-accent span around "profesional" (Bootzy TM italic accent)
- Commit all tool logo assets (nombres de herramientas/) + web images

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
